steps.title: Calculate the sum from each group
steps.content: For Lake Arden (180 trout, mean 84 inches): $180 \times 84 = 15,120$ inches. For Lake Benton (90 trout, mean 90 inches): $90 \times 90 = 8,100$ inches.

steps.title: Find the combined mean using the weighted average formula
steps.content: Add the group sums: $15,120+8,100=23,220$ inches. Divide by the total count: $$\frac{23,220}{270}=86$$ inches. The combined mean is $86$ inches, so B is correct.
